description: These low-top rustic shoes from buckaroo blend vintage cowboy styling with a contemporary minimal trend. These classic four-hole lace ups with a leather inner give off a subtly stylish vibe. Style this pair with denims or corduroy trousers and a casual check shirt.UpperLow-top leather upper with strategically placed overlay on the heelStitch detailing along the seams of the toe boxFour-hole central lace ups Padded tongueSoft insole for in-step comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heelMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with a curved midfoot and multi directional groovesshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
